## How to Be Listed as a Contributor

We recognize all contributors, whether they submit code, documentation, bug
reports, or help with community support. To be listed:

1. Make a contribution through a pull request, issue, or discussion
2. Ensure your GitHub profile is linked to the commit or issue
3. Your GitHub username will be included in the next release's contributor list

Contributions of all kinds are valued, including:

- Code (new features, bug fixes, refactoring)
- Documentation (README, docs, comments, guides)
- Bug reports and triage
- Feature suggestions and design input
- Community support (answering questions in issues and discussions)
- Translations and localization
- Testing and quality assurance
- Infrastructure and CI/CD improvements
- Design and UX feedback

## Attribution

This project is inspired by and built upon the work of the open-source
community. We gratefully acknowledge all contributors who have helped shape
ToatCloud Terminal.

If you have contributed and your name is missing from this list, please open an
issue or submit a PR to update it.
